chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Rev. Appln No.40 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of Main Case. ------------- 25th March 2025. Ms. Faizah advocate for applicant. Mr. Qamaruddin Nohri, DPG. ----------- Through instant Cr. Revision Application applicant seeks release of Mazda Mini Bus bearing Registration No.JE-0355, Engine No.12191 chassis No.000156. Precisely relevant facts of the case are that on 06.10.2024 at 1640 hours, the driver of mini bus bearing Registration No.JE- 0355, Engine No.12191 chassis No.000156 rashly and negligently caused accident to a motorcycle, as a result Syed Faheem Ali died while Mst. Afshan and baby Ema received injuries Respondent No.1 Syed Wilayat Ali is present and files his affidavit of no objection for release of mini bus, same is taken on record. Learned Deputy Prosecutor General, Sindh recorded his objection, however, reluctantly agreed that respondent No.1 / complainant of the case has sworn affidavit, raising no objection for release/return of the vehicle in favor of the applicant being last possessor. Admittedly, applicant is last possessor of the said mini bus. The respondent No.1/complainant has sworn affidavit, extending his no objection for release of said mini bus. He is also present in person, on inquiry he supported the averments of the affidavit. Accordingly, instant Cr. Revision Application is allowed and the subject vehicle Mazda Mini Bus be released/handed over to

Accordingly, instant Cr. Revision Application is allowed and the subject vehicle Mazda Mini Bus be released/handed over to Page 2 of 2 applicant upon his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.10,00,000/- and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the trial Court. However, the applicant is directed to produce the same before the trial Court, as and when required. Applicant is further directed not to sale the subject vehicle nor change its complexity or color till disposal of case and shall deposit the original documents of the vehicle with the trial court. The trial court shall ensure that no sale purchase of the subject vehicle take place till final disposal of the aforesaid case. The instant criminal revision application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E M.Zeeshan
